{{Quote|These were mostly thermal detonators, highly volatile stuff, carried by the two demolition experts, Junkin and Squalls.|From the writings of Rebel Alliance [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], describing the Endor strike team's explosives|<ref name="GG5" />}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Squalls''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] [[Rebel trooper/Legends|trooper]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] who participated in the defense of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and later fought to destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Squalls was one of two demolitions experts to join [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]], whose mission was to infiltrate the Imperial defenses on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] and blow up the [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator]] protecting the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. Along with Sergeant [[Junkin]], Squalls selected and volunteered to carry the strike team's dangerous heavy explosives, which were successfully used to complete the Rebels' [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] mission, leading to victory in the climactic Endor battle.

==Biography==
===Battle of Hoth and Endor infiltration===
{{Quote|We have stolen a small Imperial shuttle. Disguised as a cargo ship and using a secret Imperial code, a strike team will land on the moon and deactivate the shield generator.|General Crix Madine, outlining the strike team's role in the Endor mission|audio=Madine-Imperialshuttlestolen.flac|<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>}}
Squalls served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]<ref name="FF44">{{FactFile|44|END 11-14|The Battle of Endor}}</ref> in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]<ref name="SpecForce">[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi'', Second Edition]] establishes that Squalls was an [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] veteran who fought in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. [[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]] states that the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel soldiers]] assigned to protect Echo Base comprised 1,000 [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] [[Troop/Legends|troopers]] trained in [[Temperature/Legends|cold-climate]] combat.</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="GG5" /> Squalls was among the 1,000 SpecForce [[Rebel trooper/Legends|troopers]] who were assigned to protect [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]],<ref name="SpecForce" /> the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] headquarters on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]],<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref> under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]].<ref name="GG5" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> Squalls participated in the defense of the outpost against the Imperial [[Ground warfare/Legends|assault]] in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="GG5" /> a major Rebel defeat.<ref name="GG3" /> Following their evacuation from Hoth, Squalls and the other [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] remained stationed with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]<ref name="GG5" /> until [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="FF44" /> when they got their chance to strike back.<ref name="GG5" />

[[File:NatureWalk-ROTJSB.png|thumb|left|200px|General Solo leads the Rebel strike team through the Forest Moon.]]
The Alliance had discovered that the Empire was constructing a [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] above the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In order to destroy the [[Space station/Legends|station]], the Alliance first had to deactivate the [[SLD-26 planetary shield generator/Legends|planetary shield generator]] protecting the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] from Endor's surface.<ref name="ROTJ" /> [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] assembled a [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]] for the Endor mission, selecting the best Rebel commandos from the elite [[Troop/Legends|troops]] who had defended Echo Base,<ref name="RES">''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''</ref> which included Squalls.<ref name="GG5" /> Madine trained these [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] for the mission to come before turning them over to Solo, who placed his special tactics unit under the ground command of Major Derlin.<ref name="RES" /> Squalls and Sergeant [[Junkin]],<ref name="FF44" /> the [[Squad/Legends|squad's]] two demolition experts,<ref name="GG5" /> selected<ref name="FF44" /> the highly volatile explosives needed to destroy the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]<ref name="GG5" />—enough charges to take out their target in one big blast<ref name="RES" />—which they also volunteered to carry.<ref name="FF44" />

Squalls and the strike team infiltrated Endor aboard a stolen Imperial [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]], the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']].<ref name="FF44" /> Posing as a technical group and using a secret Imperial code, they were allowed to pass through the heavy [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] in Endor's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Once on the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] surface, the strike team proceeded to reconnoiter the area but soon encountered Imperial [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] patrols,<ref name="ROTJ" /> which forced Solo to direct Derlin to lead the squad ahead and rendezvous with him at the [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator bunker]].<ref name="Night Attack">{{WEGCite|story=Night Attack|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi}}</ref>

===Victory on the Forest Moon===
{{Quote|Take the squad ahead. We'll meet at the shield generator at 0300.|General Han Solo, to Major Bren Derlin|audio=SoloDerlin.flac|<ref name="ROTJ" />}}
Making their way toward the shield generator later that afternoon, Squalls and the rest of the strike team bypassed several Imperial [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] without compromising their position. At [[Standard day/Legends|nightfall]], they camped in a well-covered shallow ravine, posting two sentries and setting up a [[blanket grid]] with their [[Scanner|scanning equipment]]. They were barely into their first [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] shift when they detected an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] on patrol moving toward their position.<ref name="Night Attack" />

[[File:PoorTriggerDisciplineAllAround-ROTJ.png|thumb|right|250px|The strike team breaches the Endor shield generator bunker.]]
Derlin ordered the squad to fan out without breaking camp, hoping that the AT-ST would simply pass their position, but the walker continued straight toward them. With no alternative but to act, the squad quickly [[Jammer/Legends|jammed]] the walker's transmissions and disabled its spotlights, before circling around the machine to keep it blind as to the source of the attack. However, the AT-ST then opened fire at random, which greatly risked alerting other Imperials to the squad's presence. In response, the group's [[Medic/Legends|medic]], [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Delevar]], fired a [[Smoke canister/Legends|smoke canister]] directly into one of the walker's [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] [[Viewport/Legends|viewports]], which forced its two [[Vehicle Command Crewer|pilots]] to abandon the vehicle and surrender to the strike team. After forcing the walker [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to make a few call-ins to explain the AT-ST's absence, the squad continued on the following morning and rendezvoused with Solo at the shield generator as planned.<ref name="Night Attack" />

Solo and the strike team's command crew, which included [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], had formed an alliance with Endor's native [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], who showed the Rebels a route to the shield bunker's rear entrance. Solo led the strike team into the bunker's interior, where they began placing the explosive charges in preparation for destroying the shield generator, but they were soon ambushed and captured by the [[Tempest Force/Legends|Imperial forces]] stationed on the moon. Subsequently led back outside the bunker, the strike team's capture proved short-lived, as the Ewoks attacked the Imperials, which ultimately turned the tide of the battle in the Alliance's favor. The strike team eventually retook the bunker and successfully blew up the shield generator, leading to the destruction of the Death Star and victory in the climactic [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="ROTJ" />

==Personality and traits==
As veterans of the Battle of Hoth, Squalls and other Rebel commandos had impressed General Han Solo with their loyalty and dedication in action, which prompted him to select their hardened unit for the highly dangerous Endor mission. The defeat at Hoth had left Squalls and the other men hungry for revenge against the Empire, so they all voluntarily and eagerly accepted the risks of joining the Endor strike team.<ref name="GG5" />

The large amount of explosives necessary to blow up the Endor shield generator added an extra layer of danger to the strike team's mission. Nevertheless, Squalls and fellow commando Junkin<ref name="GG5" /> volunteered to carry<ref name="FF44" /> the highly volatile explosives.<ref name="GG5" />

==Skills and abilities==
Squalls was one of two demolitions experts to join the Endor strike team.<ref name="GG5" /> The strike team members were all masters at small-squad tactics, [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]], and nighttime combat,<ref name="30th Anniverary Collection">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=Commemorative Tin Collection|pack=Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi (Scout Trooper, Darth Vader, Princess Leia, Rebel Commando)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TACtinepisodeiVI.asp}}</ref> and they were also trained in [[Temperature/Legends|cold-climate]] combat from their service with the SpecForce complement on Hoth.<ref name="SpecForce" /> Han Solo selected his strike team members based on their resourcefulness and ability to devise creative solutions.<ref name="RES" />

==Equipment==
Squalls and the rest of the Endor strike team were equipped with basic commando gear, which included a standard [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], a low-feedback scanner, a [[Sensor scrambler (equipment)|sensor scrambler]], a [[Sound suppressor|heavily muffled]] [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and full-[[Forest/Legends|forest]]-camouflage [[Alliance military uniform/Legends|fatigues]].<ref name="GG5" />

Both Squalls and Junkin carried the strike team's explosives, which were sealed in [[Ray shield/Legends|ray-shielded]] cases and stored in [[thermal-resist pack]]s for protection during a [[Lightfight|firefight]]. These explosives were mostly thermal detonators<ref name="GG5" /> as well as [[7-PrG proton grenade]]s.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' identifies the explosive charges used by the [[Endor strike team/Legends|Endor strike team]], as seen in the film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], as [[7-PrG proton grenade]]s. Given that [[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi'', Second Edition]] states that Squalls and [[Junkin]] carried the strike team's explosives, the pair must therefore have also carried the [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]] seen in the film.</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Squalls was created for the [[1990]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]'', written by [[Michael Stern]] as a supplement for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The character was introduced in a section detailing the Rebel commandos who comprised the Endor strike team.<ref name="GG51">''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]''</ref>
